allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== espflash latest ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/esp-rs/espflash/releases/latest"\).tag_name; Write-Output "=== espflash assets ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/esp-rs/espflash/releases/latest"\).assets | Select-Object -ExpandProperty name; Write-Output "=== espup latest ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/esp-rs/espup/releases/latest"\).tag_name; Write-Output "=== espup assets ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/esp-rs/espup/releases/latest"\).assets | Select-Object -ExpandProperty name)

PowerShell(Get-Process espup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, ID, CPU, Memory; Write-Output "---"; ls "$env:USERPROFILE\\.espressif" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 FullName, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Rust toolchains ==="; rustup toolchain list; Write-Output "=== export-esp.ps1 ==="; ls "$env:USERPROFILE\\export-esp.ps1" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== .espressif ==="; ls "$env:USERPROFILE\\.espressif" -Directory 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Searching for xtensa-esp32-elf-gcc ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Recurse -Filter "xtensa-esp32-elf-gcc.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty DirectoryName; Write-Output "=== .rustup/tools ==="; ls "$env:USERPROFILE\\.rustup\\tools" -Recurse -Depth 2 -Directory 2>&1 | head -20)
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\export-esp.ps1"; cd "c:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Proj\\KC868_RUST"; cargo build --release 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Finished|error|Error" | tail -20)
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\export-esp.ps1"; cd "c:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Proj\\KC868_RUST"; cargo build --release 2>&1 | grep -E "error|warning: unused|Compiling|Finished" | head -50)

PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\export-esp.ps1"; cd "c:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Proj\\KC868_RUST"; cargo build --release 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|Compiling kc868|Finished" | Select-Object -Last 50)
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'COM\\d+' } | Select-Object Name, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'espflash|cargo|putty|arduino|platformio|pio|python|monitor|screen|minicom' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $p = [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::new\('COM5', 115200\); $p.Open\(\); Write-Output "PORT_FREE: COM5 opened OK"; $p.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output "PORT_BUSY: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($elf = "c:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Proj\\KC868_RUST\\target\\xtensa-esp32-none-elf\\release\\kc868_a6"; if \(Test-Path $elf\) { $f = Get-Item $elf; Write-Output "RELEASE ELF: $\($f.Length\) bytes, modified $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { Write-Output "NO RELEASE ELF" }; $elfd = "c:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Proj\\KC868_RUST\\target\\xtensa-esp32-none-elf\\debug\\kc868_a6"; if \(Test-Path $elfd\) { $f = Get-Item $elfd; Write-Output "DEBUG ELF: $\($f.Length\) bytes, modified $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { Write-Output "NO DEBUG ELF" })
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'COM\\d+' } | Select-Object Name, Status, PNPDeviceID | Format-List)

PowerShell([System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::GetPortNames\(\); Write-Host "---"; Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'COM\\d+' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.137.244/api/status" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "BODY:" $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "FAIL:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.137.244/" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; $html=$r.Content; Write-Host \("HTML {0} bytes" -f $html.Length\); Write-Host \("Open-Meteo: {0}" -f \($html -match 'open-meteo'\)\); Write-Host \("Yekaterinburg clock: {0}" -f \($html -match 'Yekaterinburg'\)\); Write-Host \("Relay tiles: {0}" -f \($html -match 'class=.tile'\)\) } catch { Write-Host "FAIL:" $_.Exception.Message })
